fields.name: Map Parameter Setup Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the map parameter code that is set up in the Online Map Parameter Setup window.

fields.name: Distance In
fields.tooltip: Specifies if distances in your online map should be shown in miles or kilometers.

fields.name: Route
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to use the quickest or shortest route for calculation.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the connection to online map service should be enabled
